channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Furniture fly tipped, 25th May
item.description:
Furniture has been fly tipped at the entrance to downtown road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Downtown Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Caravan camping on the edge of the Park, 25th May
item.description:
Static caravan camping on the edge of the Park displaying tables and chair and a huge gas tank. The caravan in on a car park next to the Royal Hotel and Pub
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wetherell Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp out 24/05/2026 23:00 T junction of Lansdown Road / Birkbeck Road Sidcup, 25th May
item.description:
Lamp out 24/05/2026 23:00 at T junction of Lansdown Road / Birkbeck Road Sidcup
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alma Road, Albany Park, Greater London

item.title: Broken gym equipment, 25th May
item.description:
The cross trainer/treadmill has been broken and needs fixing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maismore Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Refuse and household waste scattered around pavement and roadway., 25th May
item.description:
This is on a rear access road that runs parallel to Bromley Road. I've spoken with shop owners to ask if they can sort. Not sure how much falls under council jurisdiction of private property. But it could pose an impediment to emergency services in the event of an incident.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 488, Bromley Road, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drug use and not the first time here, 25th May
item.description:
Drug use Ashwin st

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ashwin Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 25th May
item.description:
Overnight a freezer some wooden pallets an ironing board and cupboards were dumped in the alleyway and pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Sheridan Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant flytipping in Lynn House car park, 25th May
item.description:
In this specific corner of the Lynn House car park, these people keep coming every couple of days to leave assorted mattresses and broken furniture either against the hoarding of the construction site (a fire hazard risk) or just on top of their vehicles, which they do not secure in any way. This has been going on for weeks, and having two vehicles dumping dirty mattresses and furniture is one issue, but then also having the vehicles sit there with mountains of unsecured furniture and rubbish piled on top of them is even more troubling. Someone will likely be hurt, or a fire will start if no one does anything.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ethnard Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins and fly tipping, 25th May
item.description:
The bins in Barbrook house are overflowing. We do not have enough bins to skip a bank holiday collection. We used to have four bins and now we only have three. There’s also a fly tip with some floor boards, big cardboard boxes and a chair.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paragon Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bins overflowing, 25th May
item.description:
Please can our litter bin be emptied. They are full again. Added to this the foxes have pulled out a lot of the rubbish. We have cleared up the mess. But emptying the bins two or three times a week is not enough. Any chance of having another bin? On replacing our current bins with bigger ones like the new ones in the town centre, as we would love a recycle bin option.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Park gates were not unlocked this morning, 25th May
item.description:
Please can you ensure that the gates are locked and unlocked everyday. If you are short of staff, please can you contact the Friends of Bromley Palace Park and we can support you by covering the occasional locking and unlocking of the gates.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12,14, Rochester Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glengall road, 25th May
item.description:
Sweeping needed!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 25th May
item.description:
This is the problem that i just reported about a dead fox in the garden. I rang greenwich emergency number. They said to put it in a bin bag and leave it outside the flat in the street. Which I will. Could you come to pick it up asap
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsley Wood Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 29 The Avenue, 25th May
item.description:
Litter left and bins unemprtied and I've seen rats. Its disgusting

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Dumped large size nitrous oxide canisters, 25th May
item.description:
Someone has dumped about 20 catering size nitrous oxide canisters next to the phone box in Banbury Rd. They are extremely heavy & apparently hazardous..

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southborough Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branch broken and blocking the pavement, 25th May
item.description:
Treen branch is snapped and blocking the pavement. It’s now attracting fly tipping (reported separately)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brodrick Grove, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping underneath a broken branch, 25th May
item.description:
A branch has broken and is blocking the street and now there’s flytipping underneath. Also a child’s toy found the corner

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brodrick Grove, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavements and road in poor condition on Wernbrook Street, 25th May
item.description:
Pavements and road in poor condition on Wernbrook Street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wernbrook Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in garden, 25th May
item.description:
This morning 25th may 2026. Looked out of the window about 8am. There was a dead fox in my garden.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsley Wood Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
